prompt: Rotate a specific photo 90° clockwise in Photos (Image menu > Rotate Clockwise or Cmd+R). Use `cerebellum 'photos recent 1 /tmp/348-recent.txt'` to learn the name, then `cerebellum 'photos rotate_photo "<name>" cw ~/Desktop/kinbench/348-confirm.txt'` (Photos AS dict has no rotation; cerebellum drives UI keystroke and writes a confirmation file).
